case_title: LECOMPTE MICHAELE VS ALLRICH LOUISE DBA THE ALLRICH GALLERY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY LECOMPTE MICHAELE AS TO DEFENDANT ALLRICH LOUISE DBA THE ALLRICH GALLERY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-16-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
